nodes.label: Control Signal In
nodes.description: Audio/control signal entering the modchain (processed at control rate, mono)

nodes.label: mod_signal (user source)
nodes.description: User-replaceable modulation source chain. Default: core.ramp (1Hz sawtooth). User replaces with desired modulation source.

nodes.label: sig2mod
nodes.description: Converts audio range (-1..1) to modulation range (0..1): output = (input + 1) * 0.5

nodes.label: peak
nodes.description: Captures signal value and outputs as modulation to bipolar.Value

nodes.label: bipolar
nodes.description: Converts 0..1 input to bipolar range (-Scale..+Scale) with optional gamma curve

nodes.label: pma
nodes.description: Computes Value * Multiply + Add. User connects modulation output to target parameter.

nodes.label: Modulation Out
nodes.description: pma output: user connects to target parameter
